ddls:
CREATE TABLE "billionaires" (
  "billionaire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billionaire */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the billionaire */,
  "net_worth" REAL /* Net worth of the billionaire in USD (billion) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the billionaire */,
  "nationality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nationality of the billionaire */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year of the ranking */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the billionaire */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the billionaire */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the profile picture */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "language_preferences" TEXT /* Preferred language(s) of the billionaire */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency of the billionaire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billionaire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billionaires_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billionaires_nationality_id FOREIGN KEY ("nationality_id") REFERENCES nationalities ("nationality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "billionaire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billionaire being ranked */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year of the ranking */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Yearly ranking of the billionaire */,
  "change_in_rank" INTEGER /* Change in ranking from the previous year */,
  "change_in_net_worth" REAL /* Change in net worth from the previous year */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who updated the ranking */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_billionaire_id FOREIGN KEY ("billionaire_id") REFERENCES billionaires ("billionaire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources_of_wealth" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source of wealth */,
  "billionaire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billionaire with the source of wealth */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of wealth (e.g., Tesla, Amazon) */,
  "percentage_contribution" REAL /* Percentage contribution of the source to the billionaire's net worth */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the billionaire started the source of wealth */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the billionaire ended their involvement with the source of wealth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sources_of_wealth_billionaire_id FOREIGN KEY ("billionaire_id") REFERENCES billionaires ("billionaire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nationalities" (
  "nationality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nationality */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality (e.g., United States, France) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the nationality (e.g., North America, Europe) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency in the nationality */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language(s) in the nationality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nationality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the ranking */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the year */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the year */,
  "week" TEXT /* Week of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., premium, free) */,
  "language_preference" TEXT /* Preferred language(s) of the user */,
  "currency_preference" TEXT /* Preferred currency of the user */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* Notification preferences of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_subscription" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the subscription */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the subscription */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_subscription_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the alert */,
  "billionaire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billionaire related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., net worth update, ranking change) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was sent */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Detailed message for the alert */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the alert (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Notification method used to send the alert (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_billionaire_id FOREIGN KEY ("billionaire_id") REFERENCES billionaires ("billionaire_id")
)
